THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. PARTIES PARTICIPATED IN THE SRL MEDIATION ON FEB-08-17. PER THE SIGNED MENDIATION AGREEMENT PARTIES AGREED THAT IF NEITHER PARTY RETURNS TO COURT FOR THE FINAL PROGRESS REPORT HEARING THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF FLORENTINO MORALES OR DEFENDANTS RONALD FENANDO ORDONEZ AND SOUTH CITY TOW DBA COURTSEY TOW. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
